prs.title: ⬆️ Increase lower bound to `pydantic >=2.9.0.` and fix the test suite
✏️ Fix typo for `client_secret` in OAuth2 form docstrings
🔥 Remove translation to emoji to simplify the new setup with LLM autotranslations
📝 Add missing last release notes dates
📝 Update docs for contributors and team members regarding translation PRs
💄 Fix code blocks in reference docs overflowing table width
🔨 Exclude spam comments from statistics in `scripts/people.py`
🔨 Tweak translation workflow and translation fixer tool
🔨 Fix `commit_in_place` passed via env variable in `translate.yml` workflow
🔨 Update translation general prompt to enforce link style in translation matches the original link style
👷 Re-enable translation workflow run by cron in CI (twice a month)
📝 Update links in docs to no longer use the classes external-link and internal-link
🔨 Add JS and CSS handling for automatic `target=_blank` for links in docs
🔨 Update script to autofix permalinks to account for headers with Markdown links
💄 Update styles for internal and external links in new tab
📝  Add documentation for the FastAPI VS Code extension
📌 Pin Click for MkDocs live reload
🐛 Fix, avoid yield from a TaskGroup, only as an async context manager, closed in the request async exit stack
👥 Update FastAPI People - Contributors and Translators
📝 Update Skill, optimize context, trim and refactor into references
✨ Add support for Server Sent Events
✨ Add support for streaming JSON Lines and binary data with `yield`
📝 Update Library Agent Skill with streaming responses
📝 Update docs for responses and new stream with `yield`
📝 Add `await` in `StreamingResponse` code example to allow cancellation
♻️ Fix JSON Schema for bytes, use `"contentMediaType": "application/octet-stream"` instead of `"format": "binary"`
📝 Rename `docs_src/websockets` to `docs_src/websockets_` to avoid import errors
✅ Fix all tests are skipped on Windows
♻️ Refactor logic to handle OpenAPI and Swagger UI escaping data
✨ Serialize JSON response with Pydantic (in Rust), when there's a Pydantic return type or response model
⬆ Update all dependencies to use `griffelib` instead of `griffe`
👷 Do not run codspeed with coverage as it's not tracked
👷 Do not include benchmark tests in coverage to speed up coverage processing
👷 Fix CI, do not attempt to publish `fastapi-slim`
➖ Drop support for `fastapi-slim`, no more versions will be released, use only `"fastapi[standard]"` or `fastapi`
👷 Always run tests on push to `master` branch and when run by scheduler
✏️ Fix several typos in ru translations
Fix coverage gap in serialize_sequence_value continue statement
🔥 Remove Python 3.9 specific files, no longer needed after updating translations

♻️ Update build setup for `fastapi-slim`, deprecate it, and make it only depend on `fastapi`
✅ Tweak comment in test to reference PR
📝 Use `dfn` tag for definitions instead of `abbr` in docs
✅ Test order for the submitted byte Files
♻️ Simplify reading files in memory, do it sequentially instead of (fake) parallel
✨ Show a clear error on attempt to include router into itself
♻️ Re-implement `on_event` in FastAPI for compatibility with the next Starlette, while keeping backwards compatibility
🔧 Configure `test` workflow to run tests with `inline-snapshot=review`
✅ Add inline snapshot tests for OpenAPI before changes from Pydantic v2
♻️ Refactor and simplify Pydantic v2 (and v1) compatibility internal utils

♻️ Simplify internals, remove Pydantic v1 only logic, no longer needed
♻️ Refactor internals, cleanup unneeded Pydantic v1 specific logic

👷 Run tests with Starlette from git

🔨 Update docs and translations scripts, enable Turkish

📝 Use return type annotation instead of `response_model` when possible
